attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD         
,PRODUCT_KEY                   
,DV_PRODUCT_KEY                
,SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
,ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY       
,DV_RO_PRODUCT_KEY             
,BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            
,CSCC_FLG                      
,ELA_FLG                       
,XCAT_FLG                      
,RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           
,DV_RU_SOFTWARE_USAGE_TYPE_CD  
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,CURRENT_USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER               
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,CURRENT_USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM $$STGDB.WI_RECURRING_OFFER_REVENUE W   
WHERE DML_TYPE='I'

SELECT
WI.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,
WI.PRODUCT_KEY,
WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
WI.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
COALESCE (ATTRIB.ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY,-999) AS ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY ,

 CASE WHEN NSO.CSCC_FLG = 'Y' AND OFFER_ENT.BK_PARENT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME = 'Cisco One' THEN ATTRIB.ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY
  WHEN OFFER_BUN.BK_PARENT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME = 'Cisco One' /* AND MT_MAP.PRODUCT_KEY IS NOT NULL */ THEN  WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
  ELSE COALESCE(WI.PRODUCT_KEY ,-999)  
  END as DV_RO_PRODUCT_KEY ,
  
/* CASE WHEN NSO.CSCC_FLG = 'Y' AND OFFER_ENT.BK_PARENT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME = 'Cisco One' THEN ALLC_ENT.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
 WHEN OFFER_BUN.BK_PARENT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME = 'Cisco One' */ /* AND MT_MAP.PRODUCT_KEY IS NOT NULL */ /*THEN  ALLC_BUN.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
 WHEN OFFER_BUN.BUNDLE_PRDT_OFFR_FLG = 'Y' THEN ALLC_BUN.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME 
 ELSE COALESCE( MT.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,'Others')
 END as DV_OFFER_TYPE_NAME , */
CASE
WHEN NSOA.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD IN ('CCW-FSUB','SOWB-FSUB') AND NSOA.FSUB_ELIGIBLE_FLG = 'Y' THEN NSOA.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
WHEN NSO.CSCC_FLG = 'Y' AND OFFER_ENT.BK_PARENT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME = 'Cisco One' 
        THEN CASE WHEN  OFFER_ENT.BUNDLE_SKU_CARVE_OUT_TYPE = 'Service'
		AND COALESCE(OFFER_ATTR.BK_PARENT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,'Others') = OFFER_ENT.OFFER_TYPE_CD  
		THEN MT.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME /* Priority 1 */
		ELSE COALESCE( ALLC_ENT.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,'Others')  END  /* Priority 2 */   

	WHEN OFFER_BUN.BUNDLE_PRDT_OFFR_FLG = 'Y' AND OFFER_BUN.BUNDLE_SKU_CARVE_OUT_TYPE = 'Product'
		THEN CASE WHEN OFFER_BUN.CARVE_OUT_FLG = 'Y'
		AND COALESCE(OFFER_ATTR.BK_PARENT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,'Others') = OFFER_BUN.OFFER_TYPE_CD 
			THEN OFFER_ATTR.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME 
			ELSE COALESCE( OFFER_BUN.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,'Others')  END	/* Priority 3 : C1NG purchases  */ 	

    WHEN  OFFER_BUN.BK_PARENT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME = 'Cisco One' 
		AND OFFER_BUN.BUNDLE_SKU_CARVE_OUT_TYPE = 'Service'
		THEN CASE WHEN  OFFER_BUN.CARVE_OUT_FLG = 'Y'
		  AND COALESCE(OFFER_ATTR.BK_PARENT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,'Others')= OFFER_BUN.OFFER_TYPE_CD  
		  THEN OFFER_ATTR.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
					ELSE COALESCE( OFFER_BUN.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,'Others')  END	/* Priority 3 : C1NG renewal  */ 	
				   
    WHEN OFFER_BUN.BUNDLE_PRDT_OFFR_FLG = 'Y' THEN ALLC_BUN.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME /* Priority 4 */ 
         
	WHEN OFFER_BUN.BK_PARENT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME = 'Cisco One' THEN  ALLC_BUN.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME /* This is not req'd if all Cisco One OL2's have Bundle Flag = Y */
		 
		 ELSE COALESCE( MT.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,'Others') /* Priority 5 & 6 */ 
  END AS DV_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,  /* Added as part of Q3FY20 ICPM MAR REL */
   
COALESCE(NSO.CSCC_FLG,'N') AS CSCC_FLG,

 CASE WHEN XCAT_FLAG='Y' THEN 'Y' 
       WHEN NSO.CSCC_FLG = 'Y' AND OFFER_ENT.BK_PARENT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME = 'Cisco One' THEN ALLC_ENT.ELA_FLG
    WHEN OFFER_BUN.BK_PARENT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME = 'Cisco One' /*AND MT_MAP.PRODUCT_KEY IS NOT NULL*/ THEN  ALLC_BUN.ELA_FLG

WHEN ALLC_BUN.ITEM_KEY 
		= (SELECT DISTINCT ITEM_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_XXITM_ELA_DEFAULT_ITMS_TB EX
		WHERE ALLC_BUN.ITEM_KEY = EX.ITEM_KEY AND EX.REPORT_BUN_PID_FLAG = 'Y' AND EX.END_DATE = '3500-01-01') THEN ALLC_BUN.ELA_FLG
ELSE COALESCE(MT.ELA_FLG,'N') END AS ELA_FLAG /* added as part of ELA Q2FY19 */ ,
	   
CASE WHEN NSO.XCAT_FLG = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE CASE WHEN MT.XCAT_FLG='Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END END XCAT_FLAG

 /*CASE WHEN OFFER_BUN.BK_PARENT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME = 'Cisco One' THEN  ALLC_BUN.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG
        ELSE COALESCE(MT.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,'N') END AS RECURRING_OFFER_FLG ,*/
		
	/* RO INHERITANCE CHANGES*/	

/*ADDED AS PART OF RO PRDT CHNGS Q4FY19 BY SVAKULAB*/
,CASE WHEN  'N' = (SEL ST.RO_FLG FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_RO_FLG ST)
THEN CASE WHEN NP_RO.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE='GOODS' AND ELA_FLAG='Y' THEN 'Y'
ELSE COALESCE (MT.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,'N') 
END
ELSE 
COALESCE(MT.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,'N')
END AS RECURRING_OFFER_FLAG
	   
,/*CASE WHEN OFFER_DV.BK_PARENT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME = 'Cisco One' AND MT.PRODUCT_CATEGORY_CD IN ('Software','Software Service') 
      AND MT.RU_SOFTWARE_USAGE_TYPE_CD IN ('System SW','UNKNOWN') /*AND MT_MAP.PRODUCT_KEY IS NOT NULL  THEN 'On-Premise' ELSE  */ 
 COALESCE(MT.RU_SOFTWARE_USAGE_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS DV_RU_SOFTWARE_USAGE_TYPE_CD ,
 
WI.DML_TYPE

FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_RECURRING_OFFER_REV_KEYS WI
   
  
 LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_RO_SALES_ORDER_ATHENA NSOA 
 ON NSOA.SALES_ORDER_KEY = WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY

LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_RO_SALES_ORDER NSO
ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY

LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_RO_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION  ATTRIB
ON WI.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT = ATTRIB.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
AND ATTRIB.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
AND ATTRIB.ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY > 0
AND ATTRIB.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN (SELECT  ATTRIBUTION_CD FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_RO_OFFER_ATTRB_CODE)

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_RECURRING_OFFER_PRODUCT ALLC_ENT
 ON ATTRIB.ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY = ALLC_ENT.ITEM_KEY  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_OFFER_TYPE  OFFER_ENT 
  ON OFFER_ENT.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME = ALLC_ENT.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME 

 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_RECURRING_OFFER_PRODUCT   ALLC_BUN 
  ON WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY = ALLC_BUN.ITEM_KEY   
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_OFFER_TYPE     OFFER_BUN 
  ON OFFER_BUN.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME = ALLC_BUN.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_RECURRING_OFFER_PRODUCT MT
ON  MT.ITEM_KEY = WI.PRODUCT_KEY

/*
 LEFT OUTER JOIN 
 ( SELECT PRODUCT_KEY, DV_PRODUCT_KEY FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_OFFER_TYPE_PRDT_MAP GROUP BY 1,2) MT_MAP 
  ON WI.PRODUCT_KEY = MT_MAP.PRODUCT_KEY 
  AND WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY = MT_MAP.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
*/ /* commented as part of Dec3rd rel */  

/* Added as part of Q3FY20 ICPM MAR REL*/ 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP_ESKU_SRVC
  ON ATTRIB.ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY=NP_ESKU_SRVC.ITEM_KEY
	
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_OFFER_TYPE     OFFER_ATTR
  ON OFFER_ATTR.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME = MT.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
	
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP_BUN
  ON WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY=NP_BUN.ITEM_KEY

 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_OFFER_TYPE     OFFER_DV  
ON OFFER_DV.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME = DV_OFFER_TYPE_NAME 

/* ADDED AS PART OF OCT 2018 RELEASE RO_FLG DERIVATION */
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP_RO
 ON WI.PRODUCT_KEY=NP_RO.ITEM_KEY

SELECT 
DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,
PRODUCT_KEY,
DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
SALES_ORDER_KEY,
SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
'I' DML_TYPE
FROM
(
SELECT 
CAST(DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD AS VARCHAR(70)) AS DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD ,
 STRTOK (DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,'~',1) AS PRODUCT_KEY,
 STRTOK (DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,'~',2) AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 STRTOK (DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,'~',3) AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 STRTOK (DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,'~',4) AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE NGL
WHERE EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME >=(SELECT LAST_EXTACT_DTM FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REC_OFR_REV_LAST_EXTACT_DTM) 
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5
UNION
SELECT 
DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,
 STRTOK (DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,'~',1) AS PRODUCT_KEY,
 STRTOK (DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,'~',2) AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 STRTOK (DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,'~',3) AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 STRTOK (DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,'~',4) AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE NINV
WHERE EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME >=(SELECT LAST_EXTACT_DTM FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REC_OFR_REV_LAST_EXTACT_DTM) 
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5
)A where 1=2
/*WHERE NOT EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RECURRING_OFFER_REVENUE MT
WHERE MT.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD=A.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
) */

SELECT
MT.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD  ,       
MT.PRODUCT_KEY         ,          
MT.DV_PRODUCT_KEY   ,             
MT.SALES_ORDER_KEY   ,            
MT.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
'U' DML_TYPE 
FROM   $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RECURRING_OFFER_REVENUE MT
INNER JOIN (
SELECT CAST(DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD AS VARCHAR(70)) AS DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RECURRING_OFFER_REVENUE  MT 
INNER JOIN (
SELECT ITEM_KEY FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_RECURRING_OFFER_PRODUCT
WHERE EDW_UPDATE_DTM>=(SELECT LAST_EXTACT_DTM FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REC_OFR_REV_LAST_EXTACT_DTM)
)WI
ON MT.PRODUCT_KEY=WI.ITEM_KEY 
UNION 
SELECT DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RECURRING_OFFER_REVENUE  MT 
INNER JOIN (
SELECT ITEM_KEY FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_RECURRING_OFFER_PRODUCT
WHERE EDW_UPDATE_DTM>=(SELECT LAST_EXTACT_DTM FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REC_OFR_REV_LAST_EXTACT_DTM)
) WI
 ON MT.DV_PRODUCT_KEY=WI.ITEM_KEY
 
UNION 

SELECT DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RECURRING_OFFER_REVENUE  MT 
INNER JOIN (
SELECT SALES_ORDER_KEY FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_RO_SALES_ORDER
WHERE EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME>=(SELECT LAST_EXTACT_DTM FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REC_OFR_REV_LAST_EXTACT_DTM)
) WL_SO
ON MT.SALES_ORDER_KEY=WL_SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
 
UNION 

SELECT DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RECURRING_OFFER_REVENUE  MT 
INNER JOIN (
SELECT SALES_ORDER_KEY FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_RO_SALES_ORDER_ATHENA
WHERE EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME>=(SELECT LAST_EXTACT_DTM FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REC_OFR_REV_LAST_EXTACT_DTM)
) WL_SOA
ON MT.SALES_ORDER_KEY=WL_SOA.SALES_ORDER_KEY
 
 UNION 
 
SELECT DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RECURRING_OFFER_REVENUE MT
INNER JOIN (SELECT SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT       FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_RO_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION
WHERE EDW_UPDATE_DTM>=(SELECT LAST_EXTACT_DTM FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REC_OFR_REV_LAST_EXTACT_DTM)
) WI_SOL
ON MT.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=WI_SOL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT

 UNION 
 
SELECT DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RECURRING_OFFER_REVENUE MT
INNER JOIN (SELECT PRODUCT_KEY,DV_PRODUCT_KEY,BK_OFFER_ATTRBTN_TYPE_CD      FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_OFFER_TYPE_PRDT_MAP
WHERE EDW_UPDATE_DTM>=(SELECT LAST_EXTACT_DTM FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REC_OFR_REV_LAST_EXTACT_DTM)
) PRDT_MAP
ON (MT.PRODUCT_KEY=PRDT_MAP.PRODUCT_KEY
AND MT.DV_PRODUCT_KEY=PRDT_MAP.DV_PRODUCT_KEY)

 ------------added as part of ELA Q2FY19 -------
 
UNION 
 
SELECT DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RECURRING_OFFER_REVENUE MT
INNER JOIN (SELECT ITEM_KEY     FROM $$STGDB.WI_XXITM_ELA_DEFAULT_ITMS_TB N_BUNDLE
WHERE EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME>=(SELECT LAST_EXTACT_DTM FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REC_OFR_REV_LAST_EXTACT_DTM)
) N_BUNDLE
ON (MT.PRODUCT_KEY=N_BUNDLE.ITEM_KEY)

) MT_INCR
 ON MT.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD=MT_INCR.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
